name: Reuben Rogers
abstract: Reuben Renwick Rogers (born 15th November 1974 in Saint Thomas on U.S. Virgin Islands) is an American jazz bassist, composer and educator.

about_quotes.speaker: Charles Lloyd
about_quotes.evidence: "With Eric and Reuben, and we hadn't played together in a little while..." and "You, Jason Moran, Reuben Rogers and Eric Harland are in the process of creating a very new language for the jazz quartet."
about_quotes.doc_title: Charles Lloyd — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
